title: Procheiron adapter record (adapters.jsonl)
description: One JSON object per non-empty line of {paths.memory}/index/adapters.jsonl — the machine-readable adapter registry. adapter_id values feed the validator's known_actors set (validate_procheiron2 lines 319-323). Mirrors _memory/SCHEMA.md 'Adapter Manifest Schema' plus the description/read-root fields the live registry carries. NOTE: read_roots in the live registry currently hold machine-absolute paths; the validator does not flag adapter paths today, so absolute read_roots are severity=warning (see severity_map.json and required_tokens.json — a future migration tokenizes them).

agent_or_runtime.description: Deployment-specific id; abstract in Core, concrete in the profile.
